import re

with open\("/Users/jw115/mlb-model/dashboard.py"\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

# Find every st.markdown\( call; collect it as a block until the closing \)
# Then check: does the block contain HTML-like content AND does it have unsafe_allow_html?
i = 0
issues = []
while i < len\(lines\):
    line = lines[i]
    if "st.markdown\(" in line and "unsafe_allow_html" not in line:
        # Collect this block
        block_start = i + 1
        block = line
        depth = line.count\("\("\) - line.count\("\)"\)
        j = i + 1
        while depth > 0 and j < len\(lines\):
            block += lines[j]
            depth += lines[j].count\("\("\) - lines[j].count\("\)"\)
            j += 1
        block_end = j
        
        has_html = bool\(re.search\(r"<[a-zA-Z/]", block\)\)
        has_flag = "unsafe_allow_html" in block
        
        if has_html and not has_flag:
            issues.append\(\(block_start, block[:120].replace\("\\n", " ↵ "\)\)\)
    i += 1

if issues:
    print\(f"FOUND {len\(issues\)} st.markdown\(\) calls with HTML but missing unsafe_allow_html=True:"\)
    for lineno, snippet in issues:
        print\(f"  Line {lineno}: {snippet}"\)
else:
    print\("All st.markdown\(\) calls with HTML have unsafe_allow_html=True"\)
EOF)

import pickle
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

NHL_DIR = "nhl"

# Load models
with open\(f"{NHL_DIR}/ridge_home_model.pkl", "rb"\) as f:
    home_pkg = pickle.load\(f\)
with open\(f"{NHL_DIR}/ridge_away_model.pkl", "rb"\) as f:
    away_pkg = pickle.load\(f\)

# Load feature table
ft = pd.read_parquet\(f"{NHL_DIR}/nhl_feature_table.parquet"\)
print\(f"Feature table: {len\(ft\)} rows, seasons={sorted\(ft['season_year'].unique\(\)\)}"\)

rows_2526 = ft[ft["season_year"] == 2025].copy\(\)
rows_2526_with_goals = rows_2526[rows_2526["total_goals"].notna\(\)]
print\(f"2025-26 rows: {len\(rows_2526\)}, with total_goals: {len\(rows_2526_with_goals\)}"\)

# Apply models
def predict\(pkg, df\):
    feats   = pkg["features"]
    scaler  = pkg["scaler"]
    model   = pkg["model"]
    means   = pkg.get\("col_means", {}\)
    X = df[feats].copy\(\)
    for col in feats:
        if col in means:
            X[col] = X[col].fillna\(means[col]\)
        else:
            X[col] = X[col].fillna\(X[col].mean\(\)\)
    return model.predict\(scaler.transform\(X\)\)

home_pred = predict\(home_pkg, rows_2526_with_goals\)
away_pred = predict\(away_pkg, rows_2526_with_goals\)
lambda_total = home_pred + away_pred

actual_total = rows_2526_with_goals["total_goals"].values

print\(f"\\n2025-26 Calibration Diagnostic \(n={len\(rows_2526_with_goals\)}\):"\)
print\(f"  mean\(lambda_total_raw\)   = {lambda_total.mean\(\):.3f}"\)
print\(f"  mean\(total_goals_actual\) = {actual_total.mean\(\):.3f}"\)
print\(f"  diff \(raw - actual\)      = {lambda_total.mean\(\) - actual_total.mean\(\):+.3f}"\)

# Load phase45 calibrated results if available
sim_cal = pd.read_parquet\(f"{NHL_DIR}/nhl_sim_results_calibrated.parquet"\)
print\(f"\\nnhl_sim_results_calibrated.parquet: {len\(sim_cal\)} rows"\)

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

preds = pd.read_parquet\("soccer/data/soccer_v2_2_predictions.parquet"\)
ft    = pd.read_parquet\("soccer/data/soccer_feature_table_v2_2.parquet"\)

# Pull cols we need
need = ["game_id", "market_move_to_over_2_5",
        "home_lineup_delta", "away_lineup_delta",
        "home_attack_delta_vs_away_defense", "away_attack_delta_vs_home_defense"]
df = preds.merge\(ft[need], on="game_id", how="left"\)

oos = df[df["split"] == "oos"].copy\(\)
oos["edge"] = oos["ridge_cal_p"] - oos["market_fair_p_over_2_5"]

def roi\(hits, n\):
    return \(hits * \(1/1.1\) - \(n - hits\)\) / n

def bucket_stats\(sub, label\):
    n    = len\(sub\)
    hits = sub["actual_over_2_5"].sum\(\)
    hr   = hits / n if n > 0 else np.nan
    r    = roi\(hits, n\) if n > 0 else np.nan
    return n, hr, r

# ── OVER signals \(edge >= 0.04\)
over = oos[oos["edge"] >= 0.04].copy\(\)

print\("=" * 65\)
print\("  OVER-ONLY OOS EVALUATION — Ridge Model \(2024-25\)"\)
print\("=" * 65\)

# ─ 1. Overall
n, hr, r = bucket_stats\(over, "overall"\)
print\(f"\\n1. OVER-ONLY OVERALL"\)
print\(f"   N={n}  Hit={hr:.1%}  ROI={r:+.3f}"\)

# ─ 2. Edge buckets
print\(f"\\n2. OVER-ONLY EDGE BUCKETS"\)
print\(f"   {'Bucket':<12} {'N':>5} {'Hit%':>8} {'ROI':>8}"\)
print\(f"   {'-'*36}"\)
buckets = [\(0.04,0.06\), \(0.06,0.08\), \(0.08,0.10\), \(0.10,1.00\)]
for lo, hi in buckets:
    sub = over[\(over["edge"] >= lo\) & \(over["edge"] < hi\)]
    n, hr, r = bucket_stats\(sub, f"{lo}-{hi}"\)
    flag = "✓" if r > 0 else "✗"
    label = f"{lo:.2f}–{hi:.2f}" if hi < 1 else "0.10+"
    print\(f"   {label:<12} {n:>5} {hr:>8.1%} {r:>+8.3f}  {flag}"\)

# ─ 3. By league
print\(f"\\n3. OVER-ONLY BY LEAGUE"\)
print\(f"   {'League':<12} {'N':>5} {'Hit%':>8} {'ROI':>8}"\)
print\(f"   {'-'*36}"\)
for lg in ["EPL", "BUN"]:
    sub = over[over["league_id"] == lg]
    n, hr, r = bucket_stats\(sub, lg\)
    full = "Bundesliga" if lg == "BUN" else "EPL"
    print\(f"   {full:<12} {n:>5} {hr:>8.1%} {r:>+8.3f}"\)

# ─ 4. By market movement
print\(f"\\n4. OVER-ONLY BY MARKET MOVEMENT"\)
print\(f"   {'Segment':<30} {'N':>5} {'Hit%':>8} {'ROI':>8}"\)
print\(f"   {'-'*55}"\)
late_over  = over[over["market_move_to_over_2_5"] > 0.03]
late_under = over[over["market_move_to_over_2_5"] < -0.03]
no_move    = over[over["market_move_to_over_2_5"].abs\(\) <= 0.03]

for label, sub in [\("Late over money \(>+0.03\)", late_over\),
                   \("Late under money \(<-0.03\)", late_under\),
                   \("No sig. movement", no_move\)]:
    n, hr, r = bucket_stats\(sub, label\)
    print\(f"   {label:<30} {n:>5} {hr:>8.1%} {r:>+8.3f}"\)

# ─ 5. By lineup delta
print\(f"\\n5. OVER-ONLY BY LINEUP DELTA"\)
print\(f"   {'Segment':<38} {'N':>5} {'Hit%':>8} {'ROI':>8}"\)
print\(f"   {'-'*62}"\)

# Check which delta cols have data
print\(f"   [home_lineup_delta nulls: {over['home_lineup_delta'].isna\(\).sum\(\)}, "
      f"away_lineup_delta nulls: {over['away_lineup_delta'].isna\(\).sum\(\)}]"\)

# Both attacking stronger than normal
both_strong = over[\(over["home_lineup_delta"] > 0\) & \(over["away_lineup_delta"] > 0\)]
at_least_weak = over[~\(\(over["home_lineup_delta"] > 0\) & \(over["away_lineup_delta"] > 0\)\)]

for label, sub in [\("Both teams stronger \(both delta>0\)", both_strong\),
                   \("At least one weaker \(any delta<=0\)", at_least_weak\)]:
    n, hr, r = bucket_stats\(sub, label\)
    print\(f"   {label:<38} {n:>5} {hr:>8.1%} {r:>+8.3f}"\)

# Also try home_attack_delta_vs_away_defense / away_attack_delta_vs_home_defense
print\(f"\\n   [Using attack_delta_vs_defense cols:]"\)
print\(f"   [home_attack nulls: {over['home_attack_delta_vs_away_defense'].isna\(\).sum\(\)}, "
      f"away_attack nulls: {over['away_attack_delta_vs_home_defense'].isna\(\).sum\(\)}]"\)

both_atk = over[\(over["home_attack_delta_vs_away_defense"] > 0\) & 
                \(over["away_attack_delta_vs_home_defense"] > 0\)]
any_weak_atk = over[~\(\(over["home_attack_delta_vs_away_defense"] > 0\) & 
                       \(over["away_attack_delta_vs_home_defense"] > 0\)\)]

for label, sub in [\("Both attack>defense \(both>0\)", both_atk\),
                   \("At least one team weaker", any_weak_atk\)]:
    n, hr, r = bucket_stats\(sub, label\)
    print\(f"   {label:<38} {n:>5} {hr:>8.1%} {r:>+8.3f}"\)

# ─ 6. Gate check
print\(f"\\n6. OVER-ONLY GATE CHECK"\)
print\(f"   {'Gate':<55} {'Result'}"\)
print\(f"   {'-'*70}"\)

# Gate A: OOS OVER hit >= 54%
all_n    = len\(over\)
all_hits = over["actual_over_2_5"].sum\(\)
all_hr   = all_hits / all_n
ga = all_hr >= 0.54
print\(f"   Gate A: OVER hit >= 54.0%  →  {all_hr:.1%}  {'PASS ✓' if ga else 'FAIL ✗'}"\)

# Gate B: any edge bucket ROI > 0, n >= 40
any_positive = False
for lo, hi in buckets:
    sub = over[\(over["edge"] >= lo\) & \(over["edge"] < hi\)]
    if len\(sub\) >= 40:
        h = sub["actual_over_2_5"].sum\(\)
        r = roi\(h, len\(sub\)\)
        if r > 0:
            any_positive = True
gb = any_positive
print\(f"   Gate B: Any edge bucket ROI>0, n>=40  →  {'PASS ✓' if gb else 'FAIL ✗'}"\)

# Gate C: monotonic or near-monotonic edge curve
hrs = []
for lo, hi in buckets:
    sub = over[\(over["edge"] >= lo\) & \(over["edge"] < hi\)]
    h = sub["actual_over_2_5"].sum\(\) if len\(sub\) > 0 else 0
    hrs.append\(h / len\(sub\) if len\(sub\) > 0 else 0\)
violations = sum\(hrs[i] > hrs[i+1] for i in range\(len\(hrs\)-1\)\)
gc = violations <= 1
print\(f"   Gate C: Monotonic/near-monotonic curve  →  {violations} violation\(s\)  {'PASS ✓' if gc else 'FAIL ✗'}"\)

# Gate D: no collapse in highest bucket \(0.10+\)
sub_high = over[over["edge"] >= 0.10]
n_high = len\(sub_high\)
h_high = sub_high["actual_over_2_5"].sum\(\)
hr_high = h_high / n_high if n_high > 0 else 0
r_high  = roi\(h_high, n_high\) if n_high > 0 else 0
gd = hr_high >= 0.54 and r_high > 0
print\(f"   Gate D: High-conf bucket \(0.10+\) n={n_high}, hit={hr_high:.1%}, ROI={r_high:+.3f}  "
      f"{'PASS ✓' if gd else 'FAIL ✗'}"\)

gates = sum\([ga, gb, gc, gd]\)
print\(f"\\n   OVER-ONLY VERDICT: {gates}/4 gates passed"\)
if ga and gb:
    print\(f"   → OVER-ONLY SPECIALIST: VIABLE  \(Gates A+B pass\)"\)
else:
    print\(f"   → OVER-ONLY SPECIALIST: NOT VIABLE"\)

EOF)

Bash(python3 -c "
import pickle, numpy as np
from modules.umpires import UMPIRE_RATINGS
from collections import defaultdict

with open\('/tmp/ump_2025_pergame.pkl', 'rb'\) as f:
    records = pickle.load\(f\)

LEAGUE_STD = np.std\([g['total_runs'] for g in records], ddof=1\)
MIN_GAMES = 30

def norm\(s\):
    return s.replace\('á','a'\).replace\('é','e'\).replace\('í','i'\).replace\('ó','o'\).replace\('ú','u'\).replace\('ñ','n'\)

ump_runs = defaultdict\(list\)
for g in records:
    if g['umpire']:
        ump_runs[g['umpire']].append\(g['total_runs']\)

for ump_key, rating in sorted\(UMPIRE_RATINGS.items\(\)\):
    rf = rating['runs_factor']
    games = ump_runs.get\(ump_key\)
    if games is None:
        norm_key = norm\(ump_key\)
        for raw_name, raw_games in ump_runs.items\(\):
            if norm\(raw_name\) == norm_key:
                games = raw_games
                break
    n = len\(games\) if games else 0
    if n >= MIN_GAMES:
        ump_std = np.std\(games, ddof=1\)
        raw_sigma_mult = ump_std / LEAGUE_STD
        sigma_proxy = 1 + 0.5 * \(rf - 1.0\)
        blended = 0.5 * raw_sigma_mult + 0.5 * sigma_proxy
        sigma_mult = round\(min\(max\(blended, 0.95\), 1.08\), 4\)
    else:
        sigma_mult = 1.00
    print\(f'    \\"{ump_key}\\": {sigma_mult},  # n={n}'\)
")
